commands.title: Volatility 3 — System Info
commands.description: Identify OS, kernel, and architecture from a memory dump.

commands.title: Volatility 3 — Process List
commands.description: Enumerate running processes at time of capture.

commands.title: Volatility 3 — Process Tree
commands.description: Visualize parent-child process relationships for anomaly detection.

commands.title: Volatility 3 — Network Connections
commands.description: Extract active network connections and listening ports from memory.

commands.title: Volatility 3 — Malware Detection
commands.description: Find injected code and suspicious memory regions.

commands.title: Volatility 3 — Dump Suspicious Files
commands.description: Extract files from process memory for further analysis.

commands.title: Sleuth Kit — List Deleted Files
commands.description: List deleted files by inode on an NTFS/ext image.

commands.title: Sleuth Kit — Extract by Inode
commands.description: Carve a file from a disk image using its inode number.

commands.title: Sleuth Kit — Partition Table
commands.description: Display partition layout of a forensic image.

commands.title: Bulk Extractor — Auto Carve
commands.description: Automatically extract emails, URLs, credit cards, and more.

commands.title: Find Suspicious Executables
commands.description: Locate recently modified executables in a mounted image.

commands.title: Export All EVTX Logs
commands.description: Export all Windows event logs to a review directory.
commands.command: wevtutil epl Security C:\forensics\Security.evtx & wevtutil epl System C:\forensics\System.evtx & wevtutil epl "Microsoft-Windows-PowerShell/Operational" C:\forensics\PS.evtx

commands.title: Parse EVTX with EvtxECmd
commands.description: Parse Security.evtx into CSV for timeline analysis.

commands.title: Hunt Successful Logons (4624)
commands.description: Filter Security log for successful authentication events.

commands.title: Hunt Process Creation (4688)
commands.description: Find process creation events — key for detecting execution.
commands.command: Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Security'; ID=4688} | Where-Object {$_.Message -match 'powershell|cmd|wscript'} | Select TimeCreated, Message

commands.title: Chainsaw — Sigma Hunt
commands.description: Run Sigma rules against collected EVTX logs.
commands.command: chainsaw hunt C:\forensics\evtx\ --sigma rules/ --mapping mappings/sigma-event-logs-all.yml -o results/

commands.title: Extract HTTP Hosts from PCAP
commands.description: Pull HTTP host headers from a packet capture.
commands.command: tshark -r capture.pcap -Y http.request -T fields -e http.host | sort -u

commands.title: Extract DNS Queries
commands.description: List all DNS queries — useful for C2 domain identification.
commands.command: tshark -r capture.pcap -Y dns.flags.response==0 -T fields -e dns.qry.name | sort -u

commands.title: Follow TCP Stream
commands.description: Reconstruct a TCP conversation from a PCAP.

commands.title: Zeek — Connection Log Summary
commands.description: Summarize connection logs from Zeek output.

commands.title: Suricata — Review Alerts
commands.description: Parse Suricata fast.log for triggered IDS rules.
commands.command: cat fast.log | grep -E 'ET |SURICATA' | awk '{print $NF}' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn

commands.title: Plaso — Create Timeline
commands.description: Generate a super timeline from a forensic image.

commands.title: Plaso — Export Timeline
commands.description: Export timeline to CSV for review in Timeline Explorer.

commands.title: Sleuth Kit — Mactime Bodyfile
commands.description: Create a bodyfile for timeline generation with mactime.
commands.command: fls -r -m C: image.E01 > bodyfile.txt && mactime -b bodyfile.txt -d > timeline.txt

commands.title: KAPE — Targeted Collection
commands.description: Collect high-value forensic artifacts for rapid timeline building.

commands.title: YARA — Scan Directory
commands.description: Scan files against a YARA rule set.

commands.title: Extract Printable Strings
commands.description: Pull ASCII/Unicode strings from a suspicious binary.

commands.title: PE Header Analysis
commands.description: Inspect PE headers with pefile for anomalies.

commands.title: Hash Suspicious Files
commands.description: Generate SHA256 hashes for IOC reporting and threat intel lookup.

commands.title: FLOSS — Obfuscated Strings
commands.description: Extract obfuscated strings from malware using Mandiant FLOSS.

commands.title: KAPE — SANS Triage
commands.description: Rapid triage collection using KAPE SANS targets.

commands.title: Velociraptor — Live Collection
commands.description: Collect artifacts remotely via Velociraptor VQL.

commands.title: Autoruns — Persistence Check
commands.description: Enumerate autorun locations for persistence mechanisms.

commands.title: PECmd — Parse Prefetch
commands.description: Parse Windows Prefetch files for execution evidence.

commands.title: MFTECmd — Parse $MFT
commands.description: Parse the Master File Table for file system timeline.

commands.title: Process Enumeration
commands.description: List running processes with full command lines.

commands.title: Active Connections
commands.description: Show listening ports and established connections.

commands.title: Cron Persistence Check
commands.description: Review cron jobs across users and system directories.
commands.command: for u in $(cut -f1 -d: /etc/passwd); do echo "=== $u ==="; crontab -l -u $u 2>/dev/null; done; ls -la /etc/cron.*

commands.title: Auth Log Review
commands.description: Hunt failed SSH logins and privilege escalation in auth logs.

commands.title: UAC — Live Response Collection
commands.description: Collect Linux artifacts using UAC (Unix-like Artifact Collector).
